pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point to discover magic shows, performers, and booking options.
primary_functions: Highlight main categories such as Kids Parties, Corporate Events, and Gift Cards
Provide quick search by location and date to start finding magicians or shows
Surface shortcuts to Build Your Own Show, Favorites, and My Bookings
Display featured or popular kids and corporate magic shows

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit quick search form on homepage
Click Kids Parties category tile in homepage content
Click Corporate Events category tile in homepage content
Click 'Build Your Own Show' shortcut card
Click Gift Cards category tile
Click Favorites shortcut
Click My Bookings shortcut

access_methods.description: Main navigation entry via 'Home' link
Directly visitable at site root or /index.html

pages.name: Events Search & Results
pages.description: Unified search and results page for Kids Parties, Corporate Events, All Performers, and Browse Shows.
primary_functions: Allow users to set location (city or ZIP) with radius and date via date picker
Filter shows/performers by category (kids_parties, corporate_events, browse_shows, all_performers), price, rating, duration, age group, performance type, equipment, day of week, and time of day
Sort results by total price, rating, or other key criteria
Enable quick actions on result cards such as Compare, Add to Favorites, and opening details

incoming_params.description: Search category key such as 'kids_parties', 'corporate_events', 'browse_shows', or 'all_performers'. Used to configure filters and default tab.
Optional human-readable location (e.g., 'Chicago, IL') pre-filled from homepage quick search.
Optional ZIP/postal code (e.g., '94103') if homepage or external links pass a postal code.
Optional search radius in miles; overrides default radius when provided.
Optional ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) for target event date, pre-populated from homepage quick search.
Optional sort key such as 'total_price_asc' or 'rating_desc' when user changes sorting and page reloads.
Optional page number for paginated search results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a show result card
Click on a performer result card
Click 'Compare' button after selecting two or more items

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Kids Parties', 'Corporate Events', 'Browse Shows', or 'All Performers' header links with appropriate categoryId.
Accessed when homepage quick search or other content links to events_search.html with query parameters.
Can be deep-linked with a pre-set categoryId and other search parameters.

pages.name: Show / Performer Details
pages.description: Detail page for an individual magic show or performer, including packages and booking actions.
primary_functions: Display full description, photos, ratings, pricing, and available packages (e.g., 45-minute kids show, 2-hour corporate show)
Let users select a package option, set guest count, choose an available date and start time, and click Book Now to start booking
Provide actions to Add to Favorites, Request a Quote (for shows), or Contact Performer (for performers) via on-page forms
Show key details such as performance type, equipment provided (e.g., sound system), and suitability for age groups
Link to related or suggested alternative packages when available

incoming_params.description: Show ID to display detailed information for a specific magic show.
Performer ID to display a performer profile and their shows.
Optional ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) passed from search to preselect the event date when checking availability.
Optional category context (e.g., 'kids_parties', 'corporate_events') used for breadcrumbs or 'Back to results'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Book Now' after selecting package, date, time, and guest count (after startPackageBooking succeeds)
Click 'View All Favorites' after adding an item to favorites
Click 'Go to Comparison' after adding one or more items to compare

access_methods.description: Accessed by navigating to listing.html with showId or performerId in the query string.
Shareable deep link to a specific show or performer.

pages.name: Booking Summary
pages.description: Review page for a selected package before entering attendee details or payment info.
primary_functions: Summarize selected show/performer, package duration, date, time, location, and guest count
Allow entry and application of promo codes (e.g., WEEKDAY20) and show updated pricing
Display alternative or suggested packages (e.g., other 1-hour close-up options) with ability to switch packages
Provide a clear call-to-action to proceed to the checkout / attendee information step

incoming_params.description: ID of the in-progress booking created from a show package selection.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Proceed to Checkout' after reviewing summary and promo code application

access_methods.description: Accessed after creating a booking via Show / Performer Details page, using a bookingId query parameter.

pages.name: Booking Checkout (Guest Details)
pages.description: Collect contact and event details for a booking prior to payment.
primary_functions: Collect contact information such as name, phone number, and email address
Collect event details including party address, city, and any special notes
Confirm booking summary (date, time, package, price) before payment
Provide a button such as Continue to Payment to proceed to external or final payment processing

incoming_params.description: ID of the in-progress booking to collect contact and address details for.

access_methods.description: Accessed from Booking Summary using a bookingId query parameter.

pages.name: Build Your Own Show
pages.description: Interactive builder to create custom kids magic packages with add-ons and live pricing.
primary_functions: Let users select event type (e.g., Kids Birthday ages 7), location, and event date
Allow selection of a base show (e.g., Standard 45-minute magic show)
Offer add-ons such as Balloon Twisting or Magic Workshop with checkboxes
Accept guest count and calculate total price in real time against a visible budget
Allow users to adjust selections (e.g., remove an add-on if over $400) before continuing

incoming_params.description: Optional custom package ID to pre-load an existing draft for editing.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Save Package' or 'Continue' after configuring base show, add-ons, and guest count

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Build Your Own Show' header link without parameters for creating a new package.
Accessed with a customPackageId parameter when returning to edit an existing package.

pages.name: Custom Package Review
pages.description: Review and confirm a custom-built magic show package before submitting a request.
primary_functions: Show a detailed summary of the custom package including base show, add-ons, date, time, location, and total price
Allow users to provide a custom package name (e.g., Sophia's 9th Birthday Package)
Provide a Request This Package action to submit the custom package request
Offer navigation back to the builder to adjust selections if needed

incoming_params.description: ID of the custom package draft to be reviewed and requested.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Edit Package' or similar navigation back to builder

access_methods.description: Accessed from Build Your Own Show via customPackageId query parameter.

pages.name: Gift Cards
pages.description: Page to purchase magic show gift cards with different amounts and delivery methods.
primary_functions: Allow selection of preset gift card amounts (e.g., $150) or custom amounts if supported
Let users choose delivery method (Email or physical options) and configure email delivery date
Collect recipient and sender details, including names, email addresses, and a personal message
Add configured gift card to the shopping cart with a single Add Gift Card to Cart button

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Add Gift Card to Cart' after configuring amount, delivery, and recipient details

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Gift Cards' header link.
Accessed via 'Gift Cards' footer link.
Deep-linkable page for marketing or email campaigns.

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart showing gift cards and other purchasable items before checkout.
primary_functions: List items added to the cart (e.g., a $150 email-delivered magic show gift card) with quantities and prices
Allow users to remove items or adjust quantities where applicable
Display cart subtotal and any taxes or fees as needed
Provide a clear Proceed to Checkout action (even if payment is handled externally)

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Cart' icon/link in the header.
Users can navigate directly to /cart.html to review their current cart.

pages.name: Favorites
pages.description: Saved list of preferred magicians and shows for quick access and comparison.
primary_functions: Display all shows and performers that the user has marked as favorites
Allow users to open any favorite item’s details page
Support removing items from favorites
Help users quickly revisit the best-value options they’ve identified

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a favorited show card
Click on a favorited performer card

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Favorites' header link.

pages.name: Compare Performers
pages.description: Side-by-side comparison of selected performers or shows.
primary_functions: Show two or more selected performers/shows side by side with key attributes (rating, price, duration, inclusions)
Highlight which options meet certain criteria (e.g., 2-hour corporate package under $800 with at least 4.0 stars)
Provide View Details buttons to open each compared item’s detail page
Allow users to modify which performers are in the comparison (e.g., remove one, add another)

incoming_params.description: Defines whether the comparison is between 'performer' or 'show' items; passed from the search or details page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Details' for a compared performer
Click 'View Details' for a compared show

access_methods.description: Accessed after building a compare list via search or listing pages with compareType query parameter.

pages.name: My Bookings
pages.description: Dashboard listing the user’s upcoming and past magic show bookings.
primary_functions: List all bookings with key information such as event name, date, time, and status
Allow users to open detailed views of any booking via a View Details action
Highlight upcoming events, including kids birthday magic shows that can be rescheduled
Provide access to booking management actions such as rescheduling or downloading itineraries via links to Booking Details

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View Details' on a booking row

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'My Bookings' header link; may prompt login via inline form using loginWithEmailPassword.

pages.name: Booking Details
pages.description: Detailed view of a single booking with options to manage it.
primary_functions: Show full booking information including performer, package, date, time, location, and guest count
Provide a Reschedule or Change Date control that opens an in-page calendar to pick a new date (e.g., a Sunday within 30 days)
Allow users to confirm reschedule changes and immediately update the booking summary on the page
Offer actions to View Updated Details or Download New Itinerary after changes are applied

incoming_params.description: ID of the booking whose details and reschedule options are being viewed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to My Bookings' from the booking details view

access_methods.description: Accessed from My Bookings by passing bookingId in the query string.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Information about the magic show booking service and its mission.
primary_functions: Explain the purpose of the site and how it connects users with magicians
Describe the types of events supported (kids parties, adult birthdays, corporate events, school shows)
Build trust by highlighting experience, safety, and quality standards

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact Us' call-to-action within About content

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'About' footer link.
Can be linked directly from external sites or marketing materials.

pages.name: FAQs
pages.description: Answers to common questions about booking, payments, rescheduling, and packages.
primary_functions: Address common questions about how to search, book, and manage magic shows
Include information on rescheduling policies, custom packages, and promo codes
Reduce support requests by clarifying how gift cards and quotes work

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Still need help? Contact us' link within FAQs

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'FAQs' footer link.

pages.name: Contact Us
pages.description: General contact page for support or special inquiries.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form for users to send general questions or support requests
Display alternative contact information such as email address or phone number if available
Route complex or non-standard booking questions that are not handled by on-page forms

incoming_params.description: Optional pre-filled subject line, e.g., 'Rescheduling question' or 'Corporate event inquiry'.

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Contact Us' footer link.
Can be linked directly from confirmation emails or external support links.

pages.name: Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms governing the use of the booking website.
primary_functions: Communicate user responsibilities, booking terms, and cancellation policies
Outline rules around pricing, promotions, and use of the platform
Provide a reference for dispute resolution and liability limitations

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Terms & Conditions' footer link.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Details on how user data, including booking and contact information, is collected and used.
primary_functions: Explain what personal data is collected (e.g., contact info, event details)
Describe how data is stored, used, and protected
Clarify policies on email communication and sharing data with performers

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Privacy Policy' footer link.

header_links.description: Homepage with featured categories and quick search
Create a custom magic show package
View your saved magicians and shows
View and manage your magic show bookings
View items added to your shopping cart

footer_links.description: Learn more about our magic show booking service
Frequently asked questions about booking and policies
Get in touch with support or sales
Information and purchase options for gift cards
Legal terms for using the website
How we collect and use your data
